enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Love Endravan?

The song is a peppy and romantic number that captures the excitement and energy of love.

Who are the artists behind Love Endravan?

The song is sung by Simbu with music composed by Thaman S.

What is the context of the song in the movie Vaalu?

The song features in a lively sequence, highlighting the protagonist's romantic pursuits.

When was Love Endravan released?

The song was released in the year 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Vaalu, Love Endravan is a vibrant and energetic song that showcases the protagonist's romantic adventures. Sung by Simbu, the track is infused with Thaman S's catchy beats, making it a favorite for parties and celebrations. The song conveys the excitement and thrill of love, capturing the listener's attention with its lively rhythm. It's a perfect blend of romance and dance, leaving a lasting impression.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the vibrant energy of Love Endravan from the movie Vaalu, where Simbu's dynamic vocals meet Thaman S's electrifying beats. This peppy number is perfect for setting the mood at any celebration. Dive into the world of romance and rhythm with this unforgettable track!
stanzaMeanings: I've been searching for you for a long time, my friend. I really want to see you.
If you don't listen to me, I'll have to pull your tongue out with four words.
I should cut you into pieces and hang you up. I should give you a punishment.
I should pour petrol on you in the middle of the road and set you on fire.
I should burn you and cut you in court, and make you listen to me.
You don't respect anyone, but you make others respect you. Why do you also crush those who respect you?
You give a hand to those who don't trust you, but why do you take away the hand of those who trust you?
You act like MGR, but why do you make others act like MGR?
Someone who was low becomes a king, but why does a king become low?
You serve a feast to the bad, but why do you hide it from the truthful?
Someone who thinks of you as a king gives their life for you, but why do you take the life of someone who thinks of your rise?
Why do you take the life? Why do you take the life? Why do you take the life?
STOP the MUSIC!! He's singing about boys' feelings, but I want to sing about girls' feelings.
Just put something on my shoulder like that.
He doesn't understand girls' feelings.
Sharpu.. take it out.!!!
Someone who was like Nilambari becomes Jessi, but why does Jessi become like Nilambari?
Why, why does it happen? Why, why does it happen? Why does it happen? Why, why does it happen?
A local figure becomes modern, but why does a modern figure become local?
A girl going to the pub is sent to the temple, but a girl going to the temple is sent to the pub.
A traditional woman becomes modern, but why does a modern woman become traditional?
Why, why does it happen? Why does it happen? Why, why does it happen?
ENNA YELAVU LOVE-U DA IDHU **THA.... English Translation I tried my best :) [english lyric]
